title: vachellia nilotica subsp. indica
intro: Vachellia nilotica subsp. indica, also known as Babool or Arinthal, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Vachellia nilotica subsp. indica include its potential to aid in the management of diabetes, hypertension, and various other health conditions. In herbal preparations, the tree's bark, leaves, and roots are used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall health.
